Table 'Synthetic I' 6-max Seat #3 is the button
Seat 1: utg_player ($100 in chips)
Seat 2: hj player ($85.50 in chips)
Seat 3: Hero ($100 in chips)
Seat 4: sb_villain ($120.25 in chips)
Seat 5: bb_villain ($100 in chips)
Seat 6: co (fish) ($43 in chips) is sitting out
sb_villain: posts small blind $0.50
bb_villain: posts big blind $1
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [As Kh]
utg_player: folds
hj player: folds
Hero: raises $1.50 to $2.50
sb_villain: folds
bb_villain: calls $1.50
*** FLOP *** [Td 9d 6h]
bb_villain: checks
Hero: bets $1.75
bb_villain: calls $1.75
*** TURN *** [Td 9d 6h] [2c]
bb_villain: checks
Hero: checks
*** RIVER *** [Td 9d 6h 2c] [7s]
bb_villain: bets $4.50
Hero: folds
Uncalled bet ($4.50) returned to bb_villain
bb_villain collected $10.25 from pot
bb_villain: doesn't show hand
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $10.75 | Rake $0.50
Board [Td 9d 6h 2c 7s]
Seat 3: Hero (button) folded on the River
Seat 5: bb_villain collected ($10.25)
